title: Freshly Fried Kenyan Hazelnut Skewers
description: A herbal and chewy Kenyan dish featuring hazelnuts, perfect for a sick day, made with air-fry method for a low-carb friendly snack.
instructions: Preheat the air fryer to 375 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a bowl, mix together chopped hazelnuts, grated ginger, minced garlic, lemon juice, salt, black pepper, and paprika.
Thread the hazelnut mixture onto skewers, leaving a small space between each piece.
Brush the coconut oil onto the hazelnut skewers.
Place the skewers in the air fryer basket, leaving some space between each skewer.
Cook the skewers in the air fryer for 5 minutes, shaking the basket halfway through.
Remove the skewers from the air fryer and garnish with chopped fresh parsley.
Serve the freshly fried Kenyan hazelnut skewers hot and enjoy.
